landing.heroEyebrow: For all photographers, from smartphones to film
landing.heroSubtitle: Connect the frames to create your story.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for your unique story
landing.feature1Desc: Discover the meaning of passing time, not just a frozen moment. Build a narrative from beginning to end with chapters and sub-chapters, connecting photo and text blocks organically. Your unique story unfolds here.
landing.feature2Title: Even Faster with the Native Desktop App
landing.feature2Desc: Racconto supports web, macOS, and Windows apps. Connect a local folder once, and it will automatically detect and upload new photos for a seamless workflow.
landing.feature3Desc: Records are the foundation of compelling stories. Jot down concepts, ideas, and research, then connect them directly to individual photos. Notes support full Markdown syntax.
landing.feature4Desc: Beyond simple uploads, quickly sort photos using ratings, color labels, and linked notes. Automatically extracts EXIF metadata and supports folder-based filtering.
landing.feature5Desc: racconto.app/yourname — Your story becomes your portfolio. Set a username and share your narrative. With optimal layouts and automatic sizing, it adds beauty to your story.
landing.betaDesc: Experience all features for free during the beta period.
landing.betaLimit: Open Beta: 3 projects · 1,000 photos in total
landing.mainCaption: Full project view — manage chapters, photos, and notes in one place.
landing.lightboxCaption: Lightbox view — review and sort photos at full size.
landing.coverCaption: Note panel — keep ideas and records alongside your photos.
landing.desktopOptimizationDesc: Racconto's workspace is optimized for desktop. Mobile support is planned for the future.

feature.featureDetailDesc: Plan your story and bring meaning to your photos.
feature.feature1DetailDesc: Create chapters and weave photos together. Mix photo and text blocks freely with an intuitive drag-and-drop UI to focus on your narrative.
feature.feature2DetailDesc: Native macOS and Windows apps are supported. Link a local folder for automatic detection and upload of new photos.
feature.feature3DetailDesc: Enjoy free-form note-taking for ideas and research. Link memos to specific photos with full Markdown support.
feature.feature4DetailDesc: Categorize with color labels and ratings. Automatically read EXIF data to manage hundreds of photos conveniently.
feature.feature5DetailDesc: Publish projects and set a username for your personal portfolio. Share it using your unique URL (/p/username).

electron.localFolderConnectInfo: Connecting a folder automatically detects added or deleted files upon launch.
electron.unlinkConfirm:
Unlinking this folder will move {{count}} photos uploaded from it to the trash.
Continue?
electron.folderMissingTooltip: This folder has been moved or deleted. Please unlink and re-connect it.

feedback.modalDesc: Bugs, improvements, or anything else—feel free to write!

dashboard.emptySubtitle: Shall we open your first page?
dashboard.noPublicProjectsHint: Make a project public to create your portfolio.

mobileAppInfo.title: Racconto for Mobile is scheduled for release after open beta.
mobileAppInfo.subtitle: To use Racconto now, please access via PC/Mac or download the desktop app.
mobileAppInfo.portfolioLink: Portfolios can be viewed on mobile

download.title: Racconto for Desktop
download.subtitle: Work more efficiently on your desktop.
download.eyebrow: Faster with the Native Desktop App
download.notarizationNote: Racconto is in open beta; security warnings may appear during installation. Follow the guide below to run the app.
download.feat1Desc: Photos added to your linked folder are automatically uploaded.
download.feat2Desc: Automatically detects and resumes failed uploads when the app restarts.
download.feat3Desc: Images uploaded from web and desktop are synced via Cloudflare.
download.ctaDesc: Don't have an account yet? Start on the web first.

mac.step1Desc: After downloading the .dmg, drag the icon to the Applications folder.
mac.step2Desc: Open the DMG file and drag the Racconto icon to the Applications folder.
mac.step3Detail: Go to System Settings → Privacy & Security, then click 'Open Anyway' at the bottom.
mac.step4Desc: Launch Racconto and log in with your racconto.app account.

win.step1Desc: Click the button to download the Setup.exe file.
win.step2Desc: A 'Windows protected your PC' warning may appear.
win.step2Detail: Click 'More info' and then 'Run anyway' to start the installation.
win.step3Desc: Once complete, launch Racconto from your desktop.
win.step4Desc: Log in with your racconto.app account. Linking a folder starts auto-upload.
